name: vocatopia-skills-manager
description: Vocatopia 智能 Skill 管理系統

scripts.validate:all: find skills -name 'SKILL.md' | xargs -I {} npm run validate -- {}
scripts.list: node -e "const { VocatopiaSkillRouter } = require('./scripts/skill-router'); const r = new VocatopiaSkillRouter('./skills'); console.log(JSON.stringify(r.listSkills(), null, 2))"

author: Vocatopia Team
